Bash(python3 -c "
import re
code = open\(''/tmp/strudel_web.js''\).read\(\)
# Find all occurrences of sliderWithID with surrounding context
matches = [\(m.start\(\), code[max\(0,m.start\(\)-300\):m.start\(\)+500]\) for m in re.finditer\(r''sliderWithID'', code\)]
for i, \(pos, ctx\) in enumerate\(matches\):
    print\(f''=== Match {i+1} at pos {pos} ===''\)
    print\(ctx\)
    print\(\)
")
